channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: 'The challenge is no longer identifying bots. It’s understanding what the bot, agent, or automation is doing': New report flags 40% of all internet traffic is now bad bots
item.description: The Dead Internet Theory is very much alive, as Thales finds bad bots taking up more and more of global internet traffic.

item.title: The best deals we found during Amazon’s Gaming Week
item.description: Amazon’s annual Gaming Week is bringing discounts on video games, accessories, and PC components through May 4th. This event is smaller than Amazon’s other sales, but there are some genuinely good deals. This year, we’ve found deals on popular titles like Elden Ring Nightreign, plus rare discounts on the Nex Playground console and on top-notch […]

item.title: 1 600 km d’autonomie et écrans invisibles : les Volkswagen électriques chinoises m’ont totalement bluffé
item.description: Un SUV compact à 12 500 euros, des recharges express en 800 volts et des autonomies XXL frôlant les 1 600 kilomètres. Au salon de Pékin, Volkswagen a dévoilé une gamme asiatique époustouflante pour contrer l'offensive locale. Un bond technologique monumental qui souligne le retard inquiétant du marché européen.

item.title: FOMO is why enterprises pay for GPUs they don't use — and why prices keep climbing
item.description: Enterprises can't fix their GPU waste problem because the fix makes the problem worse. Releasing idle capacity would improve utilization, but the same shortage driving GPU prices up is exactly why no team will give capacity back. So the fleet sits at roughly 5%, billed by the hour, and the cycle tightens.That pressure — repeated across thousands of enterprises over the past two years — is the reason most companies are now running their GPU fleets at roughly 5% utilization, according to Cast AI's 2026 State of Kubernetes Optimization Report, which measured actual production clusters rather than...

item.title: Uber is in the hotel business now, thanks in part to AI
item.description: Uber announced several new features on Wednesday during its annual event, which push far beyond the company's original ride-hailing purpose and deeper into its users' lives.

item.title: Amazon fait sa French Week en plein French Days et casse les prix à coup de codes promo
item.description: Amazon participe aussi aux French Days, mais sous une autre appellation : la French Week. Pour cette occasion, le géant américain dégaine deux codes promo spécialement pour vous faire économiser sur des produits Tech récents, que ce soit pour ses membres Prime ou non.

item.title: A GTA 6 competitor just launched with customizable cars and a wanted level system — it's even free on PS5
item.description: Free-to-play open-world game Neverness to Everness has launched.

item.title: How Trump Weaponized the DOJ Division That Kept Elections Fair
item.description: The Trump administration has effectively forced out more than two dozen experienced lawyers from the DOJ's Voting Section, the part of the agency responsible for upholding the Voting Rights Act.

item.title: Uber adds hotels to its app in big travel swing
item.description: Open Uber's app and you'll see options to hail a car, order some food, or go grocery shopping. And starting today, you'll see something new: hotels. In a major expansion into the world of travel accommodations, Uber says that it's adding the ability to book and pay for a hotel room to its app. The […]

item.title: Google TV is getting a dedicated row for YouTube Shorts
item.description: Google is making it easier to jump into watching YouTube Shorts on its TV devices without having to open the dedicated YouTube app. The Google TV homepage will soon introduce a new "Short videos for you" row that features a feed of personalized videos. The update is expected to roll out to Google TV devices […]

item.title: Binge watched Unchosen? Here are 3 similar Netflix shows you should add to your watchlist immediately
item.description: Unchosen was a popular addition to Netflix's library, and there's plenty more hard-hitting drama available on the best streaming service.

item.title: ChatGPT just announced it can finally pass the simple ‘how many “r”s in strawberry’ test, but users are still tripping it up by switching to ‘cranberry’
item.description: The ChatGPTapp X account just announced that ChatGPT can pass two famous Ai stumbling blocks, however reality seem to object.

item.title: I built an AI poem generator. I wasn’t prepared for how people would use it
item.description: One prompt: ‘The Love of Toes After an Injury in the Style of Poe.’ Lots of people claim that writing poetry is something only humans can do. It requires emotion, wordcraft, and the unique body of painful, jubilant lived experience that only a person can accumulate.

item.title: ‘Dead and depressing’: Meta staff vent about AI and layoffs on Blind
item.description: Negative posts about AI at Meta have more than quadrupled on the anonymous workplace platform since 2024. After Meta announced it would lay off 10% of its workforce next month to offset AI spending, employees swarmed to Blind—an anonymous online workplace forum—to get a few things off their chests.

item.title: I tested the 7 best survey and poll apps to earn money in 2026
item.description: We list the best survey and poll apps, to help you find the best ones to make money.

item.title: Suréquipé, cet écran PC gamer OLED 4K de 32″ (240 Hz) s’allège de 80 € pendant les French Days
item.description: Pensé pour les gamers exigeants, le moniteur LG 32GX870A-B mise sur un taux de rafraîchissement élevé, un temps de réponse rapide et une dalle OLED 4K, gage d'images détaillées. Pendant les French Days, Rakuten le propose à 819,99 euros au lieu de 899,99 euros.

item.title: Tumbler Ridge families sue OpenAI for not alerting police to the suspect’s ChatGPT activity
item.description: Seven families of victims injured or killed in the Tumbler Ridge school shooting in Canada have filed lawsuits against OpenAI and CEO Sam Altman, accusing the company and its leadership of negligence after they failed to alert police to the suspected shooter's ChatGPT activity. The families allege OpenAI stayed silent after its systems flagged activity […]...

item.title: ChatGPT downloads are slowing — and may cause problems for OpenAI’s IPO
item.description: ChatGPT is struggling to keep up its once-explosive growth as users uninstall the app or opt for rival chatbots instead. According to data from market intelligence firm Sensor Tower, ChatGPT experienced a 132 percent increase in uninstalls year over year in April. Its uninstall rate was even higher last month, up 413 percent year-over-year, following […]...

item.title: French Days 2026 : voici les meilleures offres Tech à saisir en DIRECT pour le lancement
item.description: C'est le top départ des French Days sur Boulanger, Fnac, Darty, Cdiscount et bien d'autres. Même Amazon s'y met avec sa French Week ! Dans tous les cas, comptez sur nous pour vous partager dans cet article, qui sera régulièrement mis à jour, les meilleures offres sur les produits Tech populaires en 2026.

item.title: Support global journalism and get a free NordVPN subscription — here's how
item.description: Internews has launched the "One Donation. Online Protection. Real Impact." campaign, rewarding supporters who give £35 to protect press freedom with a 6-month NordVPN subscription.

item.title: Google corrige 4 failles critiques dans Chrome, installez la mise à jour
item.description: Google alerte sur une nouvelle salve de failles critiques dans Chrome. Une mise à jour de sécurité est en cours de déploiement.

item.title: 'VPNs have adapted': How BlancVPN and VPN Liberty are dodging Russia's VPN blocking technology to allow Russians access to Telegram without losing everyday services
item.description: While the Kremlin's fight against VPN usage reached new heights, the tech seems to keep outsmarting the politics — for now, at least. And these are the best performing VPNs in Russia right now.

item.title: 2 years ago, incoming Apple CEO John Ternus gave a commencement speech at his alma mater. His advice is still relevant today.
item.description: ‘Always assume you’re as smart as anyone else in the room, but never assume that you know as much as they do,’ he told grads.

item.title: Meta isn’t doing enough to keep minors off of Facebook and Instagram, says the EU
item.description: The European Commission says Meta is lacking the necessary measures to prevent kids under the age of 13 from signing up for accounts. The European Union accused Meta on Wednesday of failing to stop underage users from accessing Facebook and Instagram, in violation of the bloc’s tough digital rules that require social media sites to protect minors.The EU’s executive branch said Meta Platforms lacked effective measures to prevent children younger than 13 from signing up, and that it was not doing enough to identify and remove children after they had opened accounts.Meta’s own minimum age to open...

item.title: Voici les meilleurs PC portables et tablettes qui bradent leurs prix pour les French Days
item.description: Lors des French Days, il y a de belles affaires à saisir, tout particulièrement sur les appareils informatiques et multimédias, comme les PC portables et les tablettes. Découvrez notre sélection : il y en a pour tous les goûts et tous les budgets.

item.title: Why scaling connectivity is imperative to continue meeting demand
item.description: If the UK is serious about digital inclusion, it must confront a simple truth: without connectivity, inclusion fails.

item.title: « C’est ça, la puissance de l’IA, les amis ! » : quand un développeur de Final Fantasy se moque des directives de son patron
item.description: L'utilisation de l'IA générative dans le jeu vidéo fait à nouveau débat. Chez Square Enix, l'outil divise entre demande de la direction et intérêt pour les créateurs.

item.title: 'The best of both worlds': This innovative DAC and headphone amp uses a unique processing system that basically converts your Hi-Res Audio to DSD on the fly, to give you ultra-low-distortion music — and it's packed with wired and wireless connectivity
item.description: The Topping DX9 Discrete DAC uses Hi-Res tech magic to give you the best of both worlds

item.title: 'A perfect marriage of performance and efficiency': There's a massive Apple MacBook Air sale at B&H if you want to grab our laptop of the year for cheap, but the deal ends soon
item.description: Apple MacBook Air (M4) models are heavily discounted on B&H right now — but the sale ends soon.

item.title: La Nasa accélère vers Mars avec un moteur plus puissant que tout ce qu’elle a testé
item.description: La Nasa teste actuellement un nouveau type de moteur au lithium. Il pourrait s'agir d'un moyen beaucoup plus efficace pour des missions habitées vers Mars, avec une importante réduction du temps de trajet.

item.title: The keyboard used to score Dune 2 is getting more affordable
item.description: Expressive E is making its Osmose MPE keyboard (comparatively) more affordable by ditching the synthesizer and making it a simple MIDI controller. The new Osmose CE comes in two sizes, 49 and 61 keys, for $999 and $1,199, respectively. Now, $999 is pretty expensive for a MIDI controller, but it's far less than Osmose's $1,799 […]

item.title: ‘You don’t cook a Thanksgiving turkey in the microwave’: Pentagon confirms Department of Defense will use Google Gemini for ‘classified projects’ – US military to expand AI vendors as ‘overreliance on one vendor is never a good thing’
item.description: Google's Gemini joins OpenAI's ChatGPT as AI models being leveraged by the Department of Defense for warfighting capabilities.

item.title: Apple loses bid to pause App Store fee changes as case heads to Supreme Court
item.description: Apple lost its bid to pause court-ordered App Store payment changes, keeping external purchase links in place as its case with Epic heads toward the Supreme Court.

item.title: Quels sont les meilleurs SSD internes (M.2 NVMe) pour PC en 2026 ?
item.description: Les SSD M.2, compacts et ultra-rapides, transforment les performances de votre PC de bureau (ou de votre PS5). Bienvenue sur notre sélection des meilleurs modèles de SSD internes pour tirer le maximum de vitesse et de réactivité de votre système.

item.title: AWS and OpenAI confirm cloud partnership — a day after ChatGPT maker ended its Microsoft exclusivity
item.description: AWS is already a big investor in OpenAI – Amazon Bedrock now gets access to more models after Microsoft loses exclusivity.

item.title: Bouygues Telecom augmente (encore) votre forfait en douce, comment annuler ?
item.description: Les abonnés à la marque sans engagement B&You font une nouvelle fois les frais d'une augmentation tarifaire déguisée. Bouygues Telecom active actuellement une option payante par défaut, obligeant ses clients à scruter leurs mails pour l'annuler.

item.title: Apple removes AdGuard’s TrustTunnel from Russian App Store amid censorship push
item.description: AdGuard's TrustTunnel app lacks built-in bypass features but was still targeted by regulators. Here's all we know.

item.title: Earth AI is vertically integrating the search for critical minerals
item.description: When Earth AI started hitting months-long delays in its search for critical minerals, it decided to take matters into its own hands.

item.title: 'We should be interested in what these people are like and how they behave': these AI slop-pooping robot dogs with the heads of Musk and Bezos by the artist Beeple can be seen in a Berlin museum — and they pose nuanced questions about tech ethics
item.description: Meet the AI slop-pooping robot dogs ready for a hearty discussion on AI ethics and bias

item.title: Larry’s risky business
item.description: If you want to know whether the AI bubble is bursting, there's only one publicly traded company that will tell you: Oracle. That's right, the database company. Oracle has burned its boats and pivoted to AI, but not in any kind of usual way. It is not a foundation model builder like OpenAI or Anthropic, […]

item.title: These 'ridiculously good wireless earbuds' are now just £15 at Amazon
item.description: The JLab Go Air Pop are incredibly cheap while still offering all the features you need, and right now, they're even cheaper at Amazon.

item.title: Google TV Streamer 4K : le prix du remplaçant du Chromecast est à prix inédit pour les French Days
item.description: Le Google TV Streamer 4K a pris la place du Chromecast il y a plus d'un an. Ce boîtier multimédia ambitieux, qui vous permet aussi de piloter votre maison connectée, est proposé à 79 euros au lieu de 119 euros pour les membres Amazon Prime, et 84 euros pour les autres.

item.title: Volkswagen ID.Polo (2026) : nous avons découvert la citadine électrique à moins de 25 000 € qui veut tout changer
item.description: Volkswagen tient sa nouvelle star. Après une ID.3 à la carrière en demi-teinte, la marque allemande consolide tous ses espoirs sur l’ID.Polo. Design repensé, habitacle transformé et technologies modernes, nous avons découvert la fourmi électrique. Notre avis.

item.title: Shark's SilkiPro Straight made my curly hair shine bright –I just wish it was easier to use
item.description: The Shark SilkiPro Straight costs less than its rivals, includes more in the box, and delivers impressive results, albeit with a few caveats.

item.title: Google, Samsung, Xiaomi… les 8 meilleurs deals pour renouveler son smartphone durant les French Days
item.description: Les French Days viennent de démarrer et pour celles et ceux qui souhaiteraient changer de smartphone, vous allez être servis : Google Pixel 10a, Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra, Xiaomi Redmi Note 15 5G… les plus grandes marques sont au rendez-vous avec des remises attractives. C’est clairement le moment d’en profiter !

item.title: Evolving observability architecture for cloud-scale event data
item.description: Why modern observability systems fail during incidents, and how new architectures fix them.

item.title: T-Mobile is giving away the Apple iPhone 17 for free — how to get yours
item.description: How to get free iPhone. Get the Apple iPhone 17 for free from T-Mobile, with no trade-in required.

item.title: Sri Lanka discloses another missing payment, days after hackers stole $2.5M from its finance ministry
item.description: The government of Sri Lanka has lost more than $3 million in two recent, separate cybersecurity incidents as the country continues to recover from its 2022 debt crisis.

item.title: How to watch 60 Minutes Australia online from anywhere outside Australia
item.description: Sarah Abo is back for more scintillating investigative work with the latest edition of 60 Minutes Australia — here's how to watch

item.title: Le robot aspirateur-laveur Roborock Saros Z70, doté d’un bras articulé insolite, voit son prix fondre de moitié pendant les French Days
item.description: Le Roborock Saros Z70 est un robot aspirateur-laveur à part sur le marché, en grande partie grâce à son bras articulé. Un appareil aussi original qu'intrigant que Rakuten affiche à 769 euros au lieu de 1 799 euros pendant les French Days.
